title: hopea helferi
intro: Hopea helferi, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Borneo. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hopea helferi include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The herbal preparations of Hopea helferi typically involve the extraction of its active compounds in the form of teas, decoctions, or infusions, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
